{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Traveler of Ragnarus
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[King]]'s daughter is a worthy [[Traveler of Ragnarus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
